boundary: This is a context profile over the already selected 24 edge records. It does not derive the 24 records from a candidate universe and does not close Gap A.
interpretation: This audit profiles the 24 G60 native overlay edge records as a context-dependent endpoint map. It does not search for one global permutation. Instead it asks which small context fields determine endpoint targets and records the exact visible laws for reverse_partner and shared_B rows.
